cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]dvojitý rám obrazu[/hlp]. Nejdříve smyčkou nakreslete [hlp]vnější čtverec 80×80 pixelů[/hlp] s [hlp]tloušťkou 3[/hlp]. Pak [hlp]zvedněte pero[/hlp], přesuňte se o 15 pixelů dolů a doprava, [hlp]spusťte pero[/hlp], nastavte [hlp]tloušťku 1[/hlp] a smyčkou nakreslete [hlp]vnitřní čtverec 50×50 pixelů[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">3</field><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
